name: Tomorrow.io
description: Tomorrow.io is a weather intelligence platform providing hyper-local weather data. The API offers real-time conditions, forecasts up to 15 days, historical weather since 2000, weather map tiles, route-based weather, and configurable event alerts with 80+ data fields including air quality, pollen, and fire index.

capabilities.name: weather_realtime_get
capabilities.description: Get real-time weather conditions for a location.

capabilities.name: weather_forecast_get
capabilities.description: Get weather forecast with minutely, hourly, and daily timesteps.

capabilities.name: weather_history_get
capabilities.description: Get historical weather data going back to 2000.

capabilities.name: weather_timelines_post
capabilities.description: Get custom weather timelines with specific fields and timesteps.

capabilities.name: map_tile_get
capabilities.description: Get weather map tiles for visualization.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: Get forecasted weather events based on conditions or insight categories.

capabilities.name: route_get
capabilities.description: Get weather conditions along a travel route.
